ingredients.description: 80 BPM lo-fi opener with Yamaha RM50 drum machine and jazz harmony
CMaj7-C7-CMin7-CMaj7 cycle on FMRhodes2 - classic jazz voicing
Shiloh vocal chop with lo-fi filter and saturated dry mix
Euclidean-patterned bass with chord-tone rhythm
Subtle bitcrush for lo-fi warmth
165 BPM DnB with jungle breaks and lo-fi vocal chops
Chopped jungle break loop as the core high-energy drum pattern
Warsaw bass with chromatic tension and dramatic rests
Half-time Shiloh vocal chops with evolving slice selection
MIDI-controlled delay on vocal for dub echo trails
93 BPM dark hip-hop - 'Clameur pour Clement' - dedicated piece
Fix-based dual bass: matrix synth + bass1 infra sub in parallel via fix routing

ingredients.code: $ stack ["~ <~!3 wooh>", "<morohai ~>"] with voices_celtic:32 and voices_persian:10
ingredients.description: Celtic and Persian vocal layers stacked: Morohai chant + Wooh exclamation
Piano with conditional arp: only in the last quarter of 64-cycle phrases
MIDI squiz on celtic voices for controlled vocal degradation
110 BPM mid-tempo DnB with retro console sounds
Game Boy bass with MIDI-triggered preset switching
Progressive octave offsets at nested cycle depths for gradual buildup
Atari synth lead with expanding slice exploration
MIDI reverb on moog melody with dry emphasis for presence
110 BPM breakbeat closer with long-form masks for gradual layer revelation
Multi-level mask: FMRhodes bird-call emerges after 8 cycles of silence
Dual-layer kick combining 808 sub with acoustic punch
808 hi-hat carillon with chromatic melody and MIDI sub-octave
MIDI-controlled delay on Rhodes for growing spatial depth over time
